footer.tagline: Legal services of the highest standard, protecting your business and personal interests.
footer.location: Tbilisi, D. Aghmashenebeli Ave. 66b, 4th Floor, Apt. N6

hero.subCopy: We provide comprehensive legal representation for individuals and corporate entities, safeguarding their interests at every stage of dispute resolution. Our firm brings decades of proven expertise across civil, administrative, and criminal law.

areas.title: Civil Law
areas.desc: Resolution of property, contractual, and family disputes. Full representation and advocacy at every level of the judicial system.

areas.title: Administrative Law
areas.desc: Disputes with public authorities, licensing, permitting, and the full spectrum of public law matters.

areas.title: Criminal Law
areas.desc: Rigorous defence at every stage — from initial investigation through prosecution to final adjudication.

hero.subCopy: Legal services tailored to the comprehensive protection of your business and personal interests.

services.title: Civil Law
services.desc: We represent and protect your interests in complex civil disputes, providing a tailored strategy for the effective resolution of property, contractual, and family matters — in your favour.

services.title: Administrative Law
services.desc: Engagement with public authorities demands specialised legal expertise. We safeguard your interests in administrative disputes and ensure the unimpeded obtaining of licences and permits.

services.title: Criminal Law
services.desc: In criminal proceedings, professional defence counsel is of critical importance. Our experienced attorneys ensure the full and effective protection of your rights at every stage of the proceedings.

intro.heading: Who We Are
intro.body: Founded in 2015, Darchia & Partners has established itself on the market as a trusted legal partner. Our team brings together highly qualified professionals whose years of practical experience and academic achievements guarantee maximum legal protection for our clients.

bullets.title: Years of Experience
bullets.desc: The firm is led by an attorney with over 20 years of practice, supported by lawyers with more than 10 years of experience and distinguished academic credentials.

bullets.title: Wide Specialisation
bullets.desc: We provide defence and representation for clients across criminal, civil, and administrative law.

bullets.title: Corporate Expertise
bullets.desc: For years, our firm has successfully served companies across various sectors, ensuring sound legal decision-making for each of them.

bullets.title: Academic Engagement
bullets.desc: Team members are actively involved in educational activities, leading university programmes and authoring academic publications — enabling us to apply innovative approaches to complex legal matters.

values.heading: Three Principles That Guide Everything We Do

items.title: Confidentiality
items.desc: The inviolability of all information provided by our clients is our foremost obligation.

items.title: Professional Ethics
items.desc: We operate in strict adherence to the highest standards of legal ethics, which is the foundation of the trust our clients place in us.

items.title: Innovation
items.desc: We continuously monitor legislative changes and judicial practice to offer our clients modern and effective legal solutions.

mission.body: Our mission is to create a secure legal environment for our partners by combining theoretical knowledge with rich practical experience. The measure of our success is the trust and satisfaction of our clients.

hero.subCopy: Darchia & Partners provides comprehensive legal support to corporate clients and organizations at every stage of their operations.

becomePartner.heading: Interested in Collaboration?
becomePartner.subCopy: We are seeking new partner organisations from the financial, legal, and international sectors. Contact us to explore the possibilities.

hero.subCopy: Our team comprises leading specialists in their respective fields, each capable of meeting any legal challenge with precision and expertise.

consultationBanner.heading: Need Legal Counsel?
consultationBanner.subCopy: Our experienced attorneys are prepared to assist you.

contact.title: Request a Consultation
contact.description: Fill in the form to book an initial consultation. Our attorney will contact you shortly to discuss the details.

errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid Georgian number (9 digits)
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

success.title: Request Sent Successfully
success.body: Our team will contact you shortly on the number provided.

modal.title: Confirm Your Details
modal.body: Please review your contact information before submitting.
